channel.title: A Hugo website
channel.description: Recent content on A Hugo website

item.title: SURF WEEK 3
item.description: Time: 18:00-22:00, June 24th, 2022 Venue: Tencent Meeting. Attendees: Chengxiu Ling, SURF team and volunteers (3+4), Master Students (4) Introduction to INLA Bayesian Inference In order to describe the models that INLA can fit, a vector of n observations \(\mathbf{y}=\left(y_{1}, \ldots, y_{n}\right)\) will be considered. Note that some of them may be missing observations. Furthermore, these observations will have an associated likelihood (not necessarily from the exponential family). In general, mean \(\mu_{i}\) of observation \(y_{i}\) can be linked to the linear predictor \(\eta_{i}\) via a convenient function.

item.title: About
item.description: This is a “hello world” example website for the blogdown package. The theme was forked from @jrutheiser/hugo-lithium-theme and modified by Yihui Xie.
